Subject: Transwestern Capacity Release Report - 10/2001
Message:
Attached is the Transwestern Capacity Release Report that provides information for October 2001 invoicing.  The spreads to the California border narrowed during the month of October.  Therefore, two of the three index-based packages released by PG&E (Core) are below TW's max tariff rate and the third should be billed using the floor defined on the offer ($0.4455/dth), which does exceed the max tariff rate.
If you have questions or need additional information, please let me know.
